title: Benefits Enrollment: Health Insurance and Dental Options
text:
Q: How do I enroll in health insurance and dental options?
A: To enroll in health insurance and dental options, you must complete your enrollment during the designated open enrollment period, which typically occurs annually from November 1 to November 30. During this time, you can review and select your preferred health and dental plans through the employee benefits portal. If you are a new employee, you have 30 days from your start date to enroll in benefits. After the open enrollment period, changes can only be made during the next enrollment period or if you experience a qualifying life event, such as marriage or the birth of a child. For assistance, please contact the HR benefits team at hrbenefits@company.com or call extension 1234. Make sure to have your employee ID handy when reaching out for support.
